title: Build connected AI: Orchestrate tools and agents with registries and ADK
summary: Google Cloud presented the Agent Development Kit (ADK) with Agent Registry for orchestrating tools and agents. The system enables secure connection of agents to other agents, tools, and organizational data through Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, including both existing and custom-built servers.
writeup: This video covers Google Cloud's Agent Development Kit (ADK) paired with an Agent Registry for orchestrating tools and agents. It demonstrates how agents connect securely to other agents, tools, and organizational data through Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, covering both existing and custom-built servers. The key takeaway is that the registry and MCP together provide the connective layer for building multi-agent systems on Google Cloud.
